homepage.title: CAPTRON world market leader for capacitive touch buttons - CAPTRON
homepage.description: CAPTRON is the world market leader for capacitive touch buttons and manufacturer of high-quality sensors and sensor solutions.

More
CUSTOMIZED CONFIGURATION
We produce probes within a millimeter of your tolerance
More
Home
Company
CAPTRON is the world market leader for capacitive sensor switches and manufacturer of high-quality sensors for level measurement, optical object detection and LED signaling.
CAPTRON sensors and sensor systems are used in a wide variety of industries and have been shaping the future between man-machine and machine-machine interface since 1983. Our customers benefit from more than four decades of experience, best service and reliable products - true to our motto:
Quality made in Bavaria.

products.text:
Capacitive and Optical Sensors - CAPTRON
Home
Products
CAPTRON sensors and systems
Innovative sensor technology and customized solutions
CAPTRON offers its customers sensors and sensor systems with superb user and requirements knowledge, technical expertise and tailor-made solutions.
At the customer's request, the design of our products can be modified not just in terms of their materials, symbols and labelling, but also specifically in terms of their technology and functionality.
The CAPTRON team is constantly growing its expertise in order to assist our customers and partners with the introduction of new sensor technologies through automation and security technology solution concepts as well as professional consultancy services.
CAPTRON - QUALITY MADE IN BAVARIA.
To our Product Lines
Quicklinks
Product Lines
Downloads
Service
Trade shows and exhibitions
New: CANEO series with IO-Link
The revolution in HMI technologies
The new HMI standard capacitive switch combines innovative design with the possibility to freely configure all function parameters via IO-Link – from switch sensitivity, actuation type, minimum actuation time, to choosing the right fluorescent colors from 16 million options.
Learn more
SENSORswitches
With capacitive touch function
Since 1994, CAPTRON has successfully been developing and producing capacitive switches for the opening of doors and the actuation and control of machinery and systems.
Learn more
Two-Hand control safeCAP
Safe and ergonomical
safeCAP is CAPTRON’s solution for maximum safety and ergonomics when operating heavy machinery with a high risk of injury such as presses, shears and punches.
Learn more
Level Sensors
CAPselect - free configuration of your probe
With the CAPselect system for level sensors, you are able to freely configure the probe of your choice depending on the application, container type and sensor properties.
Learn more
Optical sensors
Customised to your application
CAPTRON produces customised light barriers with red light, infra-red and laser light as well as laser TCP measuring units for maximum-precision tool calibration by industrial robots.
Learn more
LED signalling units
Long-lasting and robust
Maximum reliability - even under the most adverse conditions - is needed for intuitive orientation in buildings, in public transport or the control of machinery.
Learn more
oneGRID Pick-by-Light system
Fatigue-free order picking
Pick-by-Light with touch optimizes paperless order picking and increases picking performance by up to 50%.
Learn more
Peripheral equipment
The ideal add-on
From the ideal holder to dismantling and assembly tools. Our accessories offer an extensive range of add-on products for our sensors and systems for virtually all applications.
Learn more
